prompt: Create a polished 2.5D semi-realistic anime fashion portrait of exactly two close female friends posing together outdoors by the sea. The women are slim young adult AI-lady models with elegant faces, large expressive eyes, soft glossy skin, delicate makeup, and long wavy ash-brown hair. They stand shoulder-to-shoulder, leaning their heads slightly toward each other and looking directly at the viewer with gentle confident smiles. The left woman has a high voluminous side ponytail with loose curls and a cluster of small white flowers in her hair; she wears an off-shoulder cream ruffled blouse with puff sleeves, a black ribbon bow at the neckline, layered pearl necklaces, dangling earrings, bracelets, and a bohemian patterned skirt with lace and belt-like fabric ties. The right woman has long loose wavy hair half pinned back with small green-white floral hair accessories; she wears an off-shoulder cream floral corset top, layered pearl and pendant necklaces, hoop earrings, bracelets, and a cream lace skirt with boho details. Use a bright coastal summer background with vivid blue sky, scattered fluffy white clouds, turquoise ocean horizon, green grassy cliff, and tiny white flowers in the foreground. Lighting is sunny and flattering with soft highlights, shallow depth of field, crisp facial detail, high-resolution glamour photography blended with anime illustration, elegant bohemian bridal beach styling, pastel ivory and beige color palette, natural wind-tousled hair, no text, no watermark. Customize as two unnamed AI lady friends, ash-brown, cream bohemian off-shoulder lace fashion, sunny seaside grassy cliff, and warm close friendship.
